reason: behavior_in_task_description and no_solution_leakage are in irreconcilable conflict. Tests require specific function names (appendTitleSuffix, getTitleString) via text-matching (test_appendTitleSuffix_function_exists, test_getTitleString_function_exists), which also causes solution_uniqueness_guard and tests_verify_behavior_not_text failures. Adding these names to instruction.md would fix behavior_in_task_description but break no_solution_leakage (currently passing because instruction does not name helper functions). The root cause is test design: tests need rewrite to check behavior instead of text-matching specific function names.
